description: Adds or updates a traces panel that binds to a configured workbench traces tool (CanvasBlock with type traces and ToolGraph content). The UI will run the named tool with the given arguments to fetch trace spans. Use `tool_name` that exists on this workbench and shape `tool_args` to that tool's input schema.

identifier.description: Unique key for this canvas block (e.g. `checkout_trace_errors`).

layout.description: Required grid placement (CanvasBlock.Layout). All of x, y, w, and h must be set.

props.description: Traces widget configuration (WorkbenchJobResult.ToolGraph): human-readable framing plus the tool invocation.

query.description: Which workbench tool to call and with what arguments (WorkbenchJobResult.ToolQuery).

tool_name.description: Name of the workbench traces tool to execute.

tool_args.description: JSON string passed verbatim to that tool's input schema.
